overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a residential urban neighborhood at night. The scene features warm sodium street lighting, occasional vehicle traffic, and a distant downtown skyline as the character navigates sidewalks and crosses intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street sidewalk with street lighting

events.description: black sedan drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a metal trash can, heading toward the downtown skyline

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street, passing the camera position

entered.detail: wire mesh trash can on the sidewalk near the curb
tall black street lamp casting warm yellow light on the pavement
two-story houses with illuminated windows behind fences
tall illuminated buildings visible in the distance against the night sky
colorful spray paint markings on the asphalt street surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a quiet residential street at night, illuminated by warm sodium street lamps. The character walks along the concrete sidewalk past a metal trash can, with suburban houses on the left and the distant downtown skyline visible ahead. Colorful graffiti is visible on the road surface. A black sedan drives past on the street as the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential intersection approach with commercial signage

events.description: camera passes extremely close to a tree trunk, temporarily filling the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward an intersection, passing the Taco Bell sign

entered.detail: illuminated fast food restaurant sign with purple and yellow colors

segments.scene_description: After the car passes, the character continues walking along the sidewalk with a Taco Bell sign now visible on the left. The residential buildings shift to the right side of the frame as the camera approaches an intersection. The segment ends with a close pass by a tree trunk that temporarily occludes the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with marked crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the marked crosswalk, following another pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead and crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: dark colored vehicles parked along the curb
multi-story residential building with illuminated ground floor windows
overhead traffic signal showing red lights
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
yellow painted fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from behind the tree and approaches a street intersection. Following another pedestrian, the character crosses the multi-lane road at a marked crosswalk while the traffic light shows red. A yellow fire hydrant is visible on the opposite sidewalk as the character completes the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with downtown view and construction fencing

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk with the downtown skyline prominently visible ahead

entered.detail: wooden railing and fence along the apartment building entrance
blue painted wooden construction barrier along the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk with a wooden fence on the right and a blue construction fence visible across the street on the left. The downtown skyscrapers appear closer and more prominent in the center of the view. The character continues walking steadily down the residential street toward the illuminated city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet residential neighborhood at night that gradually draws closer to a glowing downtown skyline. It begins on a concrete sidewalk illuminated by warm sodium street lamps, passing a metal trash can and colorful road graffiti as a black sedan drives past. As the character continues forward, the residential houses shift position and a Taco Bell sign appears on the left before the view is momentarily occluded by a passing tree trunk. The scene then opens up at a street intersection, where the camera follows another pedestrian across a marked crosswalk toward a yellow fire hydrant. Finally, the perspective shifts past a wooden fence and blue construction barriers, with the distant skyscrapers becoming more prominent and dominant in the center of the frame.
